name: visual-web-stack
description: Visual web stack plugins for building high-quality animated web interfaces with React, Three.js, GSAP, and more

plugins.name: visual-web-stack
plugins.description: Cross-package integration rules and recipes for React 19 + Vite + Tailwind + R3F + Anime.js + GSAP ScrollTrigger + Lenis + Zustand. Enforces 8 iron rules that prevent common pitfalls in animation, scroll, and 3D canvas composition.
